allow: Bash(sshpass -p "2003" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo connected")
Bash(ssh -v -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo connected")
Bash(SSH_ASKPASS_REQUIRE=force SSH_ASKPASS=/bin/echo DISPLAY=:0 sshpass -p "2003" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo connected")
Bash(sshpass -p "clawos123" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo connected")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "git clone https://github.com/xbrxr03/clawos.git 2>&1 && cd clawos && bash install.sh --check 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "sudo apt-get install -y git 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S apt-get install -y git 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "git clone https://github.com/xbrxr03/clawos.git && cd clawos && bash install.sh --check 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "node --version && which node && which npm 2>/dev/null || echo 'npm missing' && ls /usr/bin/npm 2>/dev/null || echo 'not in /usr/bin'")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S apt-get install -y npm 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "cd ~/clawos/dashboard/frontend && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo 'openclaude ok'")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo 'openclaude ok'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S systemctl restart clawos 2>&1 && sleep 3 && systemctl is-active clawos && curl -sf http://localhost:7070 -o /dev/null && echo 'dashboard up' || echo 'dashboard not responding'")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "systemctl list-units --type=service | grep -i claw")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S systemctl list-units --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -i claw; ls /etc/systemd/system/ | grep -i claw")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "echo clawos123 | sudo -S bash -c 'ls /etc/systemd/system/ | grep -i claw' 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clawos_linux -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no abbu@192.168.0.15 "ls /etc/systemd/system/ 2>&1 | grep claw; ls ~/.config/systemd/user/ 2>&1 | grep claw")
